title: followup
content:
Open follow-ups for after this rev
                                                                                                              
  - CSD for GNOME: implement client-side decoration (titlebar with min/max/close buttons, drag-to-move, edge  
  resize). ~1-2 weeks.                                                          
  - Wire wp_fractional_scale_v1 into HiDpiService: fractional scale events currently log but don't propagate. 
  Pure quality, not correctness.                                                   
  - text-input-v3 for native Wayland IME: ~3-5 days.                                                          
  - Native libwayland clipboard via wl_data_device_manager: replace the wl-copy/wl-paste subprocesses. Pure
  architectural cleanup.   


  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────┬──────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────┐   
  │               Outstanding                │        Effort        │         What gets unlocked          │   
  ├──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ CSD for GNOME-Wayland (titlebar, drag,   │ Medium-large (~3-5   │ Wayland-native usable on GNOME, not │
  │ resize)                                  │ days)                │  just KDE                           │
  ├──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ Fractional-scale propagation through     │ Small (~half a day)  │ Crisp rendering on 1.25x/1.5x       │
  │ HiDpiService                             │                      │ displays                            │   
  ├──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ text-input-v3 IME on Wayland-native      │ Medium (~3-4 days)   │ CJK input methods work natively     │   
  ├──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ Native wl_data_device_manager clipboard  │ Medium (~3 days)     │ No subprocess wl-copy/wl-paste      │
  ├──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ Tmds.DBus migration for Fcitx5           │ Large (~1 week)      │ No dbus-monitor subprocess          │
  ├──────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ Handler property-mapper cleanup          │ Small (~half a day)  │ Removes redundant writes (Stage 7   │
  │                                          │                      │ hygiene)                            │   
  └──────────────────────────────────────────┴──────────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────┘
